title: MULTNOMAH COUNTY EVICTION PREVENTION PROGRAM - 211info
text: 211INFO MULTNOMAH COUNTY EVICTION PREVENTION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF May be able to provide financial or legal assistance with non-payment of rent evictions for households with an eviction notice. Cannot assist with evictions issued due to property damage, illegal activity, or creating a nuisance. Assistance is not guaranteed and is determined on a case-by-case basis. There may be a waitlist and assistance is not same day or immediate. Partnering agencies work to assist households as fast as possible. Eligibility: Household with any type of eviction notice for non-payment of rent (72 hour, 10 day, 30 day, court ordered, notice of restitution) Hours: Phone, Text, Email: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email 211 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone 211 Text Short Code 898211 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, or text to be screened for assistance FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Eviction notice for non-payment of rent LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation services available AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: Eviction Prevention Assistance Rent Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: DISASTER SERVICES - 211INFO DCM LINE DISASTER SERVICES - GORGE CITIZEN ALERT PROGRAM DISASTER SERVICES - SEVERE WINTER WEATHER INFORMATION SERVICES DISASTER SERVICES - WINTER AND SEVERE WEATHER INFORMATION SERVICES MULTNOMAH COUNTY FOOD - 211INFO SNAP AND FOOD ACCESS HOUSING/SHELTER - COORDINATED ENTRY FOR FAMILIES MULTNOMAH COUNTY HOUSING/SHELTER - MULTNOMAH COUNTY FAMILY SHELTER WAITLIST INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - 211INFO CHILD CARE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - 211INFO COORDINATION CENTER INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - 211INFO MATERNAL AND CHILD HEALTH PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - 211INFO RESOURCE PARENT SUPPORT INFORMATION SERVICES - 211INFO ICE IMPACT SUPPORT INFORMATION SERVICES - 211INFO INFORMATION AND REFERRAL INFORMATION SERVICES - 211INFO OUTREACH AND MATERIALS REQUESTS INFORMATION SERVICES - 211INFO RESOURCE DEPARTMENT INFORMATION SERVICES - OREGON HIV/STD HOTLINE MONEY MANAGEMENT - 211INFO FINANCIAL WELLNESS UTILITIES - 211INFO UTILITY ASSISTANCE UPDATES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
